ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "risk_factors_assessed" TEXT /* Risk factors assessed in the study */,
  "analysis_type" INTEGER /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., multivariate, univariate) */,
  "significant_risk_factors" TEXT /* Significant risk factors identified in the study */,
  "odds_ratio_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the odds ratio */,
  "odds_ratio_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the odds ratio */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the odds ratio */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the study */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Names or IDs of the research team members */,
  "study_location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the study was conducted */,
  "study_population" TEXT /* Population studied */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, published) */,
  "study_url" TEXT /* Link to the study's publication or dataset */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date range for data collection */,
  "data_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date range for data analysis */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants or samples in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_analysis_type FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the risk factor (e.g., demographic, clinical, environmental) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the risk factor (e.g., years, kg, mmHg) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  "description_detail" TEXT /* More detailed description of the risk factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "analysis_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type (e.g., multivariate, univariate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis type */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Specific methodology used in the analysis (e.g., logistic regression, Cox proportional hazards model) */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Software used for the analysis (e.g., R, SPSS) */,
  "description_detail" TEXT /* More detailed description of the analysis type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "significant_risk_factors" (
  "significant_risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each significant risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the significant risk factor */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value associated with the significant risk factor */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level (e.g., 95%, 99%) */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the significant risk factor */,
  "direction_of_effect" TEXT /* Direction of the effect (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("significant_risk_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_risk_factors" (
  "study_risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-risk factor link */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_value" TEXT /* Specific value or range of values for the risk factor in the study */,
  "risk_factor_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the risk factor in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_risk_factors_risk_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_factor_id") REFERENCES risk_factors ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_risk_factors_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_significant_risk_factors" (
  "study_significant_risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-significant risk factor link */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "significant_risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the significant risk factor */,
  "significant_risk_factor_value" TEXT /* Specific value or range of values for the significant risk factor in the study */,
  "significant_risk_factor_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the significant risk factor in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_significant_risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_significant_risk_factors_significant_risk_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("significant_risk_factor_id") REFERENCES significant_risk_factors ("significant_risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_significant_risk_factors_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's affiliated institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
